metadata.lyrics:
[00:45.94] Whoa-whoa-whoa
[00:47.02] 
[01:02.18] Whoa-whoa-whoa
[01:02.53] 
[01:18.65] I'm a loser, that is a fact for sure
[01:22.39] I am happy even if you don't want
[01:26.12] To invite me out for a dance tonight
[01:30.08] I'm not normal, I know it, I don't care
[01:35.91] 
[01:43.93] Whoa-whoa-whoa

[02:20.65] I'm never gonna say I'm sorry
